subcodes.first_line: O Lord and my Hope! I beseech Thee in my mornings and evenings, and remember Thee at daybreak and nightfall, and I humbly supplicate unto Thee in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی ادعوک فی غدوی و آصالی و اذکرک فی صباحی و مساای و اتضرع الیک فی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for forgiveness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
